items.name: log4j-detector
items.description: A public open sourced tool.  Log4J scanner that detects vulnerable Log4J versions (CVE-2021-44228, CVE-2021-45046, etc) on your file-system within any application. It is able to even find Log4J instances that are hidden several layers deep. Works on Linux, Windows, and Mac, and everywhere else Java runs, too!  TAG_OS_TOOL, OWNER_KELLY, DC_PUBLIC
